experience.summary: Web applications with Angular and .NET: scalable, maintainable, high-performance solutions. Refactoring with best practices and AI (LLMs, MCP, skills) to optimize development and planning.
Angular and .NET architecture under Clean Architecture. CI/CD with Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions, plus code generation and review automation.
End-to-end platform for Energy Saving Certificates (CAE) with Angular + NestJS, structured with DDD and Clean Architecture.
Angular migrations, microfrontends (Angular Elements and Web Components), NgRx, PrimeNG, JSON-driven configurable systems and CI/CD with Jenkins.
.NET microservices integrated with Angular. DevOps with Azure, SQL Server and xUnit testing.
Hybrid apps with Ionic + Angular, business logic in C# and optimized SQL queries.
Led multi-platform solutions: Angular, Flutter, Laravel and real-time maps with Node.js + WebSockets.
Full-stack Angular + .NET, IIS deployments, support and SQL administration for Ecopetrol's management systems.
.NET + SQL development, technical support and equipment maintenance.
.NET + SQL development and support for e-business applications.

projects.name: chalc-cli-adapter
projects.description: chalc: a local CLI that creates and equips projects from minute zero. It detects your stack without spending tokens, applies a rules catalog and hands your assistant (Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor or Gemini) skills, MCP servers, rules and the Spec-Driven Development method in its native format — configuration that travels with the project, explicit and repeatable.

projects.name: cc-form-engine
projects.description: Advanced Angular library for reactive form generation and management: dynamic validation, change tracking and customizable error messages.

projects.name: cacode
projects.description: AI-powered project reviewer: code quality, best practices, performance, security, architecture and database issues. Connects to any LLM, discovers MCP servers and generates an interactive HTML report.

projects.name: cc-dynamic-voice-forms
projects.description: Describe the form you need with your voice and AI generates it automatically. Angular + Ollama in action.

projects.name: whatsapp-openai-bot-service
projects.description: NestJS microservice integrating WhatsApp Web, Redis and OpenAI to build a virtual assistant with conversation history and dynamic replies.

projects.name: angular-modularize-skill
projects.description: Angular modularization skill for AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot): Core/Shared/Features pattern, lazy loading and standalone migration.

projects.name: mcp-postgres-claude
projects.description: MCP server that connects Claude straight to PostgreSQL databases.
